title: Biome of Emotions
description: 🌈 Elemental Emotions Mod brings your feelings to life in Minecraft with a haunting new biome: The Biome of Emotions.
body:
🌈 Elemental Emotions Mod brings your feelings to life in Minecraft with a haunting new biome: The Biome of Emotions.

Here, you’ll encounter four mysterious and powerful creatures, each representing a raw human emotion:

😢 Sadness — Always crying, this blue giant comes for you with tears that weaken and slow you, dropping a magical blue orb if defeated.

🔥 Anger — A colossal being wreathed in fire and rage, its stomps shake the earth and summon flames. If you’re brave enough to bring it down, you’ll earn its mighty hammer.

🌟 Joy — A deceptively happy creature sitting peacefully… until you get too close. Slay it to gain glowing, protective powers.

👻 Fear — A faceless, floating terror that rushes at you from above. If you can beat your fear, you’ll claim its lightning-fast claw as your weapon.

💎 Each mob has its own abilities, animations, sounds, and unique drops to help (or haunt) you in your adventures.

Are you ready to face your emotions and conquer the Biome of Emotions?


📌 Requires:

geckolib-forge-1.20.1

particlepresets-forge-1.20.1

Make sure to install these alongside the mod!
